programme.title: In the Heights
programme.desc: Film version of the Broadway musical, In the Heights. Usnavi, a New York bodega owner, saves every penny every day as he imagines and sings about a better life.

programme.title: Up in the Air
programme.desc: George Clooney is Ryan Bingham, a corporate downsizing expert whose cherished life on the road is threatened.

programme.title: Humane
programme.desc: HUMANE takes place over a single day, mere months after a global ecological collapse has forced world leaders to reduce the earth’s population.

programme.title: Not Without Hope
programme.desc: Four best friends went for a fishing trip. While attempting to free a trapped anchor, their boat capsizes, throwing them into the freezing water.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
programme.desc: Po must face two hugely epic, but different threats: one supernatural and the other a little closer to home.

programme.title: The Golden Compass
programme.desc: A girl must use her magic compass to seek children, who are kidnapped in a ploy that would endanger the world.

programme.title: Looney Tunes: Back in Action
programme.desc: Brendan Fraser and Jenna Elfman team up with Daffy Duck and friends in the biggest animated adventure ever to hit real life!

programme.title: Juror #2
programme.desc: A juror in a high-profile murder trial faces a serious moral dilemma… one that could sway the jury to convict or free the accused killer.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
programme.desc: Po must face two hugely epic, but different threats: one supernatural and the other a little closer to home.

programme.title: In the Heights
programme.desc: Film version of the Broadway musical, In the Heights. Usnavi, a New York bodega owner, saves every penny every day as he imagines and sings about a better life.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: This star-packed extravaganza brings the comic book legend to the big screen where an infant superhero is sent to Earth just as his home planet, Krypton, explodes.

programme.title: Looney Tunes: Back in Action
programme.desc: Brendan Fraser and Jenna Elfman team up with Daffy Duck and friends in the biggest animated adventure ever to hit real life!

programme.title: Juror #2
programme.desc: A juror in a high-profile murder trial faces a serious moral dilemma… one that could sway the jury to convict or free the accused killer.

programme.title: Turtles All the Way Down
programme.desc: Turtles All the Way Down tackles anxiety through its 17-year-old protagonist, Aza Holmes.

programme.title: Something in the Rain Ep12
programme.desc: When a single career woman reunites with her best friend's younger brother after he returns from three years of working abroad, their efforts to reconnect grow into romance.

programme.title: Innocent Witness
programme.desc: A housekeeper is charged with murder. Her attorney is surprised to learn the only witness to the crime is a teenage girl with Asperger's. Will the girl be able to provide a valid statement?

programme.title: The Unfair
programme.desc: A demonstration against urban renewal project leads to death of a police and a teenage boy. The boy's father, who claims he's innocent, was arrested for the cop's death.

programme.title: Race to Freedom: Um Bok Dong
programme.desc: K-pop star Rain portrays Um Bok-dong, an unlikely hero in a government-organized bicycle race during the Japanese colonial era. Defeating Japanese rivals, his victories inspire locals and resistance fighters.

programme.title: 6/45: Lucky Lotto
programme.desc: The excitement of winning a lottery ticket doesn’t last long for sergeant Chun-woo as it accidentally ends up crossing the Military Demarcation Line. He must get his act together and find it again!

programme.title: Noryang: Deadly Sea
programme.desc: In the last battle of Yi Sun-Sin in 1598, he fought against the Japanese army and intertwined with the Ming dynasty, bringing the 7-year Japanese invasions of Korea to an end...

programme.title: The King's Letters
programme.desc: King Sejong desires to create an original alphabet for his people. With the help of others, they struggle to create the Korean alphabet Hangul.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: When an Olympic gold medalist boxer met a young boxer who falls victim to match fixing, he vows to start a boxing team at the school he teaches at and give his student a shot at the nationals.

programme.title: Confession
programme.desc: Three lifelong friends get wrapped up in a robbery-arson case. Suspicious of the investigation and the police, Hyun-tae starts digging for the truth himself and asks his best friend for help.

programme.title: Boy in the Pool
programme.desc: Seok-young bumps into Woo-ju and they get closer after Woo-ju saves her from drowning. They lost touch after Woo-ju moves to Seoul to be a swimmer. Will they be able to meet again?

programme.title: 4PM
programme.desc: A couple moved to a new house, dreaming of a peaceful country life. But they face a terrifying reality due to their neighbor, who visits them at the same time every day with just silence…

programme.title: Veteran
programme.desc: A merciless detective hunts down a young and successful drug addict who always escapes from investigations with the help of his wealth and connections.

programme.title: The Long Way Home
programme.desc: During the Korean war, a South Korean soldier, is ordered to deliver a classified document but gets attacked and loses it. A clumsy North Korean solider picks it up, and they eventually meet at the western front.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and Blade's personalities clash as they track Klaus and Veruca and fight off some of Po's old foes. Blade gets to see Po's kung fu mastery, but doesn't agree to team up with him until she realizes that he accidentally holds the key to finding Klaus and Veruca: he has a piece of the WuGao Gauntlet. Meanwhile, Klaus and Veruca continue on their path of destruction while looking for the mysterious "Lotus".

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po's moral lines are blurred when he and Blade have to break an untrustworthy hedgehog monk (Zhen) out of jail to get more information on what Klaus and Veruca stole from the Lotus. They learn from Zhen that there are in fact three more weapons, and Po recognizes one of them from a comic book.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony races against Shashi and Layla through a Northern California ghost town, but Shashi and Layla are using the race as a cover for a heist on a billionaire’s train. Tony and his team are introduced to the other cool SH1FT3R racers, and while they can’t stop the heist without blowing their cover, they do manage to get a tracker on the train car Shashi and Layla stole.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: An average high school student, Jim Lake, yearns for adventure and he gets more than he bargained for when he inherits the mantle of Trollhunter after the previous Trollhunter is killed

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim warms up to the idea of being the Trollhunter until he faces Bular, who is determined to destroy him, so he seeks help in Blinky and AAARRRGGHH!!

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim is not welcomed by the Trolls as their new Trollhunter, and he suffers a humiliating defeat at the hands of Draal

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: The evil General Morando launches a coup on the alien planet Akiridion-5. In the ensuing battle, the planet's King and Queen are severely injured, and their surviving son Krel and daughter Aja escape the planet with military commander, Varvatos Vex. They seek refuge on a backwater planet: Earth.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja, Krel, and Vex explore Earth looking for technology to repair their ship. When the high school Principal demands to meet Aja and Krel's guardians, the Royal teens transform two maintenance robots (Blanks) to pose as their "human" parents.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: In an effort to blend in with their surroundings, Krel engineers a device to get into the "mind-set" of humans and ends up discovering far more than he expected. Meanwhile, General Morando's bounty hunters close in on the Royals.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When the Gabby Cats get stuck in the leaves of an overgrown cupcake tree, it's up to Gabby, Pandy and cupcake-expert Cakey to work together to shrink the overgrown cupcake tree branch by branch--and to save CatRat from where he's stuck at the top! For our COTD segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Kitty Fairy's garden is transformed into a fairy-riffic fairground for The Fairy Festival! At the festival, Gabby and Pandy meet an excitable little fairy named Luli-loo who joins them as they explore the festival. Luli-loo may not be the best at all the fair games, but she's never afraid to give it a go and learn from her mistakes!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The Gabby Cats put their own spin on the classic fairytales "Rapunzel," "The Princess and the Pea," and "Little Red Riding Hood." For the Cat of the Day Segment, CatRat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Cat-O-Ween in the dollhouse, and all the Gabby Cats are in the holiday spirit. Gabby and Pandy dress up and go trick-or-treating around the dollhouse, where they make cat-o-lanterns with Baby Box, search for hidden treats with MerCat, and make Banana ghosts with Cakey. Along the way, CatRat plays silly tricks on them, but in the end Floyd manages to trick them all! For the Cat of the Day segment, all the Gabby Cats sing a special Cat-O-Ween song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After putting the final topper on the Christmas tree, Figgy the Elf calls and says that Santa Kitty needs help in his workshop, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go help her out. After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: Ty, Revvit and the crew save a band of Woodland Reptools from an evil and destructive Sawmetradon named Splitter who refuses to join the Trux team.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Fang Decay Why is Thatch acting meaner than usual? He has a fang-ache! Scare Day Mantha is determined to become the first zombie ever to win the Super Boo?Scare School's ultimate scaring competition.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Disarmed and Dangerous When Mantha's arm falls off, her replacement limb turns out to be a monstrous tentacle! Frankenleftovers Casper gets a seemingly impossible class assignment—to create life!

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert and his friends chase all over Nutwood when Ping Pong's spell accidentaly makes his scooter run away.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Undersea adventures when Rupert, Bill and Ping Pong have to rescue Miranda the Mermaid from the clutches of a Giant Clam.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Pixie forget about their little sisters and their plans to hang out. Scallop goes to Unicorn Land and meets Juniper. They play and become friends. / The unicorns are eager to play with a new mystery item that washes up on the beach, but what is it? While the other unicorns come up with imaginative ideas of what it could be, Pixie is determined to find out exactly what it is.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When Pixie’s pet crab goes into a cave, Kelp uses his knowledge of crabs under the sea to coax him out using dance and rhythm. / Scallop’s special shell is broken, but Kelp transforms the broken bits into something even more special.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a school notebook and lunch box, it's Kitty School Day in the dollhouse! Gabby and Pandy head to different classes held by the Gabby Cats to learn and live a day in the life of a student.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a new camera that takes pictures with silly filters, CatRat uses it to lead Gabby, Pandy, and the Gabby Cats on a photographic scavenger hunt around the dollhouse!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When the happy-go-lucky sea lions draw crowds away from his show, Alex decides that he needs to act like the Sea Lions. When Alex’s attempts to compete with them don’t bring back the crowds, he learns to be true to himself rather than try to be someone he's not (i.e. fish gotta swim, birds gotta fly, and lions gotta roar... and do backflips on land).

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Gloria sneaks into the NY Ballet to audition for “Swan Lake” and gets rejected (not for her dancing, but because she’s a hippo), Gloria’s belief in herself is tested.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Pixie forget about their little sisters and their plans to hang out. Scallop goes to Unicorn Land and meets Juniper. While the other unicorns come up with imaginative ideas of what it could be, Pixie is determined to find out exactly what it is.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When Pixie’s pet crab goes into a cave, Kelp uses his knowledge of crabs under the sea to coax him out using dance and rhythm. / Scallop’s special shell is broken, but Kelp transforms the broken bits into something even more special.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When the crew takes on a mission to help Ian get some rest for a Badminton Tournament, Jax realises that the biggest approach isn't always the best approach. / When Lula loses her comic book, Ari learns that the best heroes rely on teamwork and not gadgets.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When a pesky gopher gets in the way of Fawna making her famous veggie stew, Niah learns to not let a bad experience, get in the way of doing good. / When the inexperienced Rona has to step in for Donna, the team makes sure everyone has the best camping trip ever.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild

programme.desc: When Gloria sneaks into the NY Ballet to audition for “Swan Lake” and gets rejected (not for her dancing, but because she’s a hippo), Gloria’s belief in herself is tested.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When 6 adorable hamster kitties get loose in the dollhouse, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box head out to look for them. Along the way, Baby Box learns a lot about hamster kitties, which convinces Mama Box to let them live in the Craft Room.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a school notebook and lunch box, it's Kitty School Day in the dollhouse! Gabby and Pandy head to different classes held by the Gabby Cats to learn and live a day in the life of a student.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Magnus and Axel unveil their new "mechano-dragon." It's impressive at first, but the Riders set out to prove it's no better than a bucket of bolts.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: In need of some rest and relaxation, the Riders head out on vacation. But their supposedly perfect island getaway isn't quite what they hoped for.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: Sherman begs Peabody to keep a Wolly Mammoth he names Captain Cools as his pet; Marco Polo wins three deadly noodle challenges to discover spaghetti.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: Christine won't release Peabody from handcuffs until he lets her sing; the Wright Brothers must get their plane back from a flock of angry birds

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: A mischievous new breed of dragons called Vine Tails steal the Book of Dragons.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: Tom and the riders must work together to rescue Eugene from a dragon’s nest.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: After reuniting with his parents, King Julien doesn't want them to leave so he recreates a booty-shaking dance recital they had never seen.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: Mort becomes jealous when King Julien's wish for a little brother finally comes true after his parents adopt a socially awkward Aye-Aye named Brodney.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: When Toby's ninja brothers try to get him to steal San Lorenzo's treasure, he must decide between them and his friendship with Puss.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: The Duchess seeks Artephius' soul for her spell collection, and it's up to Puss to protect him. It turns out that The Duchess and Artephius have a complicated relationship.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Stoick, Hiccup and Snotlout search for Spitelout when he goes missing, and ultimately find him on a distant island battling a fiery Singetail dragon.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Astrid comes down with the Odin's Revenge flu and the Riders must search for the cure by finding a nearly extinct Buffalord dragon before Viggo does.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: The Riders head to a tropical island for fun in the sun, not realizing it's infested with Grimora Leeches which drives their dragons to turn on them.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: After a crowverine gliding mishap, Dawn loses her confidence and tells Eep she's taking a break from adventures. Eep convinces Dawn to join her on one last adventure – climbing Grrr Mountain.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Hope oversteps by trying to teach Sandy manners, Ugga gets her revenge by challenging Hope to do the impossible: civilize Thunk.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: Ugga has a secret - she's taking Eep to "flop with the bulrusses" - a fun and dangerous pastime Ugga enjoyed as a teen. Ugga's excitement fades when Hope invites herself and Dawn along.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When Baby Corp babies start aging, panic hits the office and the babies set out to find out if someone has been tainting the formula

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: The annual baby pageant approaches, but Staci’s plan to win may have a negative effect

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby struggles to take a sick day even though a mysterious baby cry is wreaking havoc on the neighborhood baby-love

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and Jun take a risk in revealing the secret of the Hidden Realm to D’Angelo to aid an injured dragon, and D’Angelo bonds with Plowhorn.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and the others debate how to keep the dragons a secret, even as a rambunctious young “cloaking” dragon gets loose in town and pursues a friendship with a reluctant Alex.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and the Riders try to save ICARIS when it’s revealed to be in danger from a monstrous dragon.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and Blade must convince a deceased comic book writer's son to give them information about an unreleased comic that may point them toward the next weapon: a whip of fire. However, after the events of 103 Po is now a wanted criminal, so the Emperor's Forbidden Company arrives and captures him. Torn between saving Po and the mission she's sworn to complete, Blade flees and abandons Po.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: A mysterious figure helps Po escape the guards, so Po makes his way to a desert market, determined to prove Blade wrong for leaving him behind. But when he accidentally stumbles into Klaus and Veruca, he and Blade awkwardly reunite while giving chase, and work through their differences. But the mysterious figure has followed Po and tries to capture them, clearly a new threat to our team.

programme.title: Mad Concrete Dreams
programme.desc: Upon achieving the coveted status of a landlord, mounting debts lead Soo-Jong into participating a staged kidnapping, yet the plan spirals out of control as the fake kidnapping turns dangerously real.

programme.title: Handsome Guys
programme.desc: The cast travels across South Korea, discovering unique culture, nature, magical places, and fascinating people. Each episode features different guests, joining in the joyful journey.

programme.title: Rented in Finland
programme.desc: Lee Je-hoon, Lee Dong-hwi, Cha Eun-woo, and Kwak Dong-yeon will leave their urban lives behind to experience the serene and picturesque rural life in Finland.

programme.title: Stage Fighter

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and Blade's personalities clash as they track Klaus and Veruca and fight off some of Po's old foes. Blade gets to see Po's kung fu mastery, but doesn't agree to team up with him until she realizes that he accidentally holds the key to finding Klaus and Veruca: he has a piece of the WuGao Gauntlet. Meanwhile, Klaus and Veruca continue on their path of destruction while looking for the mysterious "Lotus".

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po's moral lines are blurred when he and Blade have to break an untrustworthy hedgehog monk (Zhen) out of jail to get more information on what Klaus and Veruca stole from the Lotus. They learn from Zhen that there are in fact three more weapons, and Po recognizes one of them from a comic book.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony races against Shashi and Layla through a Northern California ghost town, but Shashi and Layla are using the race as a cover for a heist on a billionaire’s train. Tony and his team are introduced to the other cool SH1FT3R racers, and while they can’t stop the heist without blowing their cover, they do manage to get a tracker on the train car Shashi and Layla stole.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: An average high school student, Jim Lake, yearns for adventure and he gets more than he bargained for when he inherits the mantle of Trollhunter after the previous Trollhunter is killed

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim warms up to the idea of being the Trollhunter until he faces Bular, who is determined to destroy him, so he seeks help in Blinky and AAARRRGGHH!!

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim is not welcomed by the Trolls as their new Trollhunter, and he suffers a humiliating defeat at the hands of Draal

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: The evil General Morando launches a coup on the alien planet Akiridion-5. In the ensuing battle, the planet's King and Queen are severely injured, and their surviving son Krel and daughter Aja escape the planet with military commander, Varvatos Vex. They seek refuge on a backwater planet: Earth.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja, Krel, and Vex explore Earth looking for technology to repair their ship. When the high school Principal demands to meet Aja and Krel's guardians, the Royal teens transform two maintenance robots (Blanks) to pose as their "human" parents.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: In an effort to blend in with their surroundings, Krel engineers a device to get into the "mind-set" of humans and ends up discovering far more than he expected. Meanwhile, General Morando's bounty hunters close in on the Royals.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When the Gabby Cats get stuck in the leaves of an overgrown cupcake tree, it's up to Gabby, Pandy and cupcake-expert Cakey to work together to shrink the overgrown cupcake tree branch by branch--and to save CatRat from where he's stuck at the top! For our COTD segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Kitty Fairy's garden is transformed into a fairy-riffic fairground for The Fairy Festival! At the festival, Gabby and Pandy meet an excitable little fairy named Luli-loo who joins them as they explore the festival. Luli-loo may not be the best at all the fair games, but she's never afraid to give it a go and learn from her mistakes!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The Gabby Cats put their own spin on the classic fairytales "Rapunzel," "The Princess and the Pea," and "Little Red Riding Hood." For the Cat of the Day Segment, CatRat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Cat-O-Ween in the dollhouse, and all the Gabby Cats are in the holiday spirit. Gabby and Pandy dress up and go trick-or-treating around the dollhouse, where they make cat-o-lanterns with Baby Box, search for hidden treats with MerCat, and make Banana ghosts with Cakey. Along the way, CatRat plays silly tricks on them, but in the end Floyd manages to trick them all! For the Cat of the Day segment, all the Gabby Cats sing a special Cat-O-Ween song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After putting the final topper on the Christmas tree, Figgy the Elf calls and says that Santa Kitty needs help in his workshop, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go help her out. After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: Ty, Revvit and the crew save a band of Woodland Reptools from an evil and destructive Sawmetradon named Splitter who refuses to join the Trux team.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Fang Decay Why is Thatch acting meaner than usual? He has a fang-ache! Scare Day Mantha is determined to become the first zombie ever to win the Super Boo?Scare School's ultimate scaring competition.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Disarmed and Dangerous When Mantha's arm falls off, her replacement limb turns out to be a monstrous tentacle! Frankenleftovers Casper gets a seemingly impossible class assignment—to create life!

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert and his friends chase all over Nutwood when Ping Pong's spell accidentaly makes his scooter run away.

programme.title: Rupert Bear

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Pixie forget about their little sisters and their plans to hang out. Scallop goes to Unicorn Land and meets Juniper. They play and become friends. / The unicorns are eager to play with a new mystery item that washes up on the beach, but what is it? While the other unicorns come up with imaginative ideas of what it could be, Pixie is determined to find out exactly what it is.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When Pixie’s pet crab goes into a cave, Kelp uses his knowledge of crabs under the sea to coax him out using dance and rhythm. / Scallop’s special shell is broken, but Kelp transforms the broken bits into something even more special.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a school notebook and lunch box, it's Kitty School Day in the dollhouse! Gabby and Pandy head to different classes held by the Gabby Cats to learn and live a day in the life of a student.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a new camera that takes pictures with silly filters, CatRat uses it to lead Gabby, Pandy, and the Gabby Cats on a photographic scavenger hunt around the dollhouse!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When the happy-go-lucky sea lions draw crowds away from his show, Alex decides that he needs to act like the Sea Lions. When Alex’s attempts to compete with them don’t bring back the crowds, he learns to be true to himself rather than try to be someone he's not (i.e. fish gotta swim, birds gotta fly, and lions gotta roar... and do backflips on land).

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Gloria sneaks into the NY Ballet to audition for “Swan Lake” and gets rejected (not for her dancing, but because she’s a hippo), Gloria’s belief in herself is tested.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go

programme.desc: A mischievous new breed of dragons called Vine Tails steal the Book of Dragons.

programme.desc: Tom and the riders must work together to rescue Eugene from a dragon’s nest.

programme.desc: After reuniting with his parents, King Julien doesn't want them to leave so he recreates a booty-shaking dance recital they had never seen.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: Mort becomes jealous when King Julien's wish for a little brother finally comes true after his parents adopt a socially awkward Aye-Aye named Brodney.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: When Toby's ninja brothers try to get him to steal San Lorenzo's treasure, he must decide between them and his friendship with Puss.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Stoick, Hiccup and Snotlout search for Spitelout when he goes missing, and ultimately find him on a distant island battling a fiery Singetail dragon.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Astrid comes down with the Odin's Revenge flu and the Riders must search for the cure by finding a nearly extinct Buffalord dragon before Viggo does.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: The Riders head to a tropical island for fun in the sun, not realizing it's infested with Grimora Leeches which drives their dragons to turn on them.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: After a crowverine gliding mishap, Dawn loses her confidence and tells Eep she's taking a break from adventures. Eep convinces Dawn to join her on one last adventure – climbing Grrr Mountain.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Hope oversteps by trying to teach Sandy manners, Ugga gets her revenge by challenging Hope to do the impossible: civilize Thunk.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When Baby Corp babies start aging, panic hits the office and the babies set out to find out if someone has been tainting the formula

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: The annual baby pageant approaches, but Staci’s plan to win may have a negative effect

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and Jun take a risk in revealing the secret of the Hidden Realm to D’Angelo to aid an injured dragon, and D’Angelo bonds with Plowhorn.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and the others debate how to keep the dragons a secret, even as a rambunctious young “cloaking” dragon gets loose in town and pursues a friendship with a reluctant Alex.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and the Riders try to save ICARIS when it’s revealed to be in danger from a monstrous dragon.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and Blade must convince a deceased comic book writer's son to give them information about an unreleased comic that may point them toward the next weapon: a whip of fire. However, after the events of 103 Po is now a wanted criminal, so the Emperor's Forbidden Company arrives and captures him. Torn between saving Po and the mission she's sworn to complete, Blade flees and abandons Po.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: A mysterious figure helps Po escape the guards, so Po makes his way to a desert market, determined to prove Blade wrong for leaving him behind. But when he accidentally stumbles into Klaus and Veruca, he and Blade awkwardly reunite while giving chase, and work through their differences. But the mysterious figure has followed Po and tries to capture them, clearly a new threat to our team.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Kowloon Walled City
programme.desc: Neng was a street fighter in Northeast China but decides to start a new life in Hong Kong’s Kowloon Walled City. Unfortunately, he is implicated in the fights and conspiracies among the triad forces. When his good friend is hunted down by the triad, Neng must team up with the residents of Kowloon Walled City to fight back and save his friend.

programme.title: Hidden Heroine
programme.desc: A drug cartel is entrenched in the Dong Zhou area. Mei Jing of the Thunderbolt Women’s Commando Unit, leads her team to attack the drug base, but they are being ambushed and the identity of Mei’s father as an undercover is exposed. After a fierce battle, Mei and her team manage to successfully defeat the drug cartel and rescue her father.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Uncle Hua is a retired agent who owns an antique shop on an old street. When the old street is forcibly demolished by the local Green Dragon Gang one day, Uncle Hua’s hidden identity is accidentally revealed, and he is pursued by a mysterious organization headed by Ah Jie. A fatal duel has just begun!

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: Big news brings an emotional time to Theresa's family. While visiting her doctor to help manage her menopause, Theresa brings forth her doctor's gushing mom.

programme.title: The Neighbor Who Saw Too Much
programme.desc: A grounded teen becomes convinced that her hot new neighbour is actually a dangerous killer. When no-one else believes her, she takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: Ppang Car Road 2
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1)
programme.desc: Dottie the body lost her confidence when a bump started growing between her thighs. Dr. Lee brings in a new, young doctor to help Tim with his big, bumpy nose. Karime is insecure about her birthmark.

programme.title: MasterChef USA (S13)
programme.desc: Season 13 celebrates the “United Tastes of America,” bringing together chefs from four regions of the country: the Northeast, the Midwest, the West and the South.

programme.title: A Boyfriend to die for
programme.desc: Olivia never wanted to be known as a product of nepotism, but as a rising star in her father's firm, that's exactly how people see her. Determined to prove herself, she meets Jonathan Rothfield.

programme.title: The Neighbor Who Saw Too Much
programme.desc: A grounded teen becomes convinced that her hot new neighbour is actually a dangerous killer. When no-one else believes her, she takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1)
programme.desc: Serge and Jacinthe have often travelled to the East Coast over the years to visit family. Now they want to find a permanent home for their visits, one they can pass down for generations.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: It's sandwich night in Rachael's kitchen and she's serving up an array of Italian sandwiches, with ingredients like roasted aubergine, sweet bell peppers, spicy mortadella with pistachio, and so much more.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Join Jason Wang to explore the Pagoda of Once Cut Pork, a renowned Taiwanese dish where Chef Hong Ming skillfully carves pork belly into a delectable, melt-in-your-mouth “pagoda” with precision knife work.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16)
programme.desc: Strategy and mind-games rule the kitchen as contestants bid against one another, trading time for ingredients in a MasterChef classic – the time auction. Contestants compete to cook to avoid elimination.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1)
programme.desc: Bill's swinging-arm growth prevents him from living his retirement dreams. Regina distracts from the many moles on her face with a vibrant sense of style.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Follow Jason Wang and learn about the White Snow Osmanthus Crab, a classic Taiwanese dish that marries theatricality with oceanic umami. Master Chef Kuo Hong-che demonstrates how it is made.

programme.title: The Neighbor Who Saw Too Much
programme.desc: A grounded teen becomes convinced that her hot new neighbour is actually a dangerous killer. When no-one else believes her, she takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: A Pickleball Christmas
programme.desc: After winning the biggest match of his career, professional tennis phenom Luke Hollis is ready to hang up his racket and take over family's tennis club.

programme.title: Got to Leave Something
programme.desc: They meet the finest biker of Jiri Mountain, a poet who fled city life to live in the mountains. From this poet, who captures photos of stars and flowers, the two actors learn poetry.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: When a horrible tragedy befalls someone close to her, Theresa continues to deliver messages while experiencing her own grief. Things get intense when the victim of tragedy makes himself known to Theresa.

programme.title: The Mother Flip (S1)
programme.desc: Kristy and Rebecca hike up their favourite nature trail to get a bird's-eye view of a potential flip in the community of Wimberley, Texas, which is known for its big-city wealth and small-town charm.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16)
programme.desc: Contestants must cook a dish using all nine ingredients in Poh’s Everything Mystery Box. The winner scoring themselves $5,000 to spend at Harvey Norman, the bottom three head straight into Pressure Test.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah combines French cuisine with deep Southern cooking in her take on bouillabaisse. She starts by making a homemade broth with fish remnants, vegetable scraps, spices and more in a pot.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1)
programme.desc: Liz and Chris have both enjoyed living near the ocean and want to provide their three kids with the same experience. However, they have different opinions on how much to spend to make this dream a reality.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Living in Tuscany allows for the enjoyment of a long truffle season. Rachael shows how to use local truffles to add amazing flavour to a decadent dish of scrambled eggs and potato chips.

programme.title: Ppang Car Road 2
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: Jake Makes it Easy (S1)
programme.desc: Bagels get elevated from a breakfast dish to a perfect anytime meal with this everything bagel galette with heirloom tomatoes. The spin on a favourite is combined with a chocolate-filled banana bread.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: An unassuming night out with her girlfriends yields one of the most emotional and surprising readings, as Theresa delivers messages to a skeptical woman grieving the shocking loss of her pregnant daughter.

programme.title: The Factory Wonders
programme.desc: We explore a factory in Sagamihara where they make machines that skewer ingredients for famous Japanese foods like yakitori and oden. How do they ensure each piece is cooked to soft, juicy perfection?

programme.title: Time-Lapse Japan
programme.desc: Cape Ashizuri is marked by rugged cliffs and peculiar rocks. A strong current off its coast has been the cause of many accidents. Enjoy the scenery at the cape, a place of worship, in time-lapse.

programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.desc: At the Satoyama Kitchen guesthouse in Hida Takayama, chef Nobuko, her cameraman husband Makoto and their cat Tama take us on a tasty journey of local cuisine served with a side of seasonal scenery.

programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.title: Magical Japanese

programme.desc: In response to a serious labor shortage, Japan's taxi industry is hiring more and more foreign drivers. The program introduces the efforts by both the government and taxi companies to facilitate this.

programme.desc: In this episode, we learn about boshu and geshi, two dates from early summer. The chefs prepare ume plums and tea leaves and teach us how to make a pair of refreshing summer dishes.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.desc: The truth proves elusive for a former prosecutor who is enlisted to defend an Army officer accused of murdering his wife's rapist.

programme.title: The Specialist
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone and Sharon Stone star in this hard-edged thriller about an ex-CIA explosives expert (Stallone) who helps a seductive beauty (Stone) avenge the murder of her parents by a powerful Cuban-American crime boss.

programme.title: The Scorpion King
programme.desc: In a time of darkness and in the face of evil, one man dared to fight back. Utilising his combat skills as an assassin, a warrior defies an empire to become a legend and unite a nation.

programme.title: Vertigo
programme.desc: James Stewart and Kim Novak star in Alfred Hitchcock’s masterpiece thriller about an acrophobic detective hired to shadow a friend’s mysterious and suicidal wife.

programme.desc: The truth proves elusive for a former prosecutor who is enlisted to defend an Army officer accused of murdering his wife's rapist.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Po (Jack Black) faces his biggest challenge since becoming the Dragon Warrior to lead The Furious Five on a mission of epic proportions and defeat his most threatening rival yet.

programme.title: Inside Man
programme.desc: A police detective, a bank robber and a high-power broker enter high-stakes negotiations after the criminal's brilliant heist spirals into a hostage situation.

programme.title: Baby Boom
programme.desc: The life of super-yuppie J.C. is thrown into turmoil when she inherits a baby from a distant relative.

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A bounty hunter learns that his next target is his ex-wife.

programme.title: Inside Woodlands Checkpoint
programme.desc: Twenty-hour hours a day, seven days a week, ICA officers at the Woodlands Checkpoint sieve out threats from the thousands of travellers passing through as well as helping those in need of aid.

programme.title: Singapore Tonight
programme.desc: (Live) From business to politics, health to technology, the latest news from Singapore and analysis of the impact.

programme.title: Lunch With Us
programme.desc: Have lunch in Singapore with a chef introducing a S6 Michelin-endorsed hawker meal. Explore a hidden vegetarian hotspot inside a temple. And a halal food vlogger reveals a favourite food haunt.

programme.title: Inside Woodlands Checkpoint
programme.desc: On a long weekend with half a million travellers passing through Woodlands Checkpoint, ICA officers there must be on their toes, dealing with immigration clearance and cases of contraband smuggling.

programme.title: Headline News
programme.desc: The latest top stories of the hour.

programme.title: East Asia Tonight
programme.desc: Spotlight on East Asia, a region steeped in history and now helping to write the future of our world. We'll break down the key stories and explain why they matter.

programme.title: Singapore Hour
programme.desc: Explore Orchard Plaza’s hidden Japanese enclave, uncover a wild mosquito-powered dengue strategy, dive into fast cars and quick bites, and meet an Australian volunteering for Singapore’s army.

programme.title: Singapore Tonight
programme.desc: From business to politics, health to technology, the latest news from Singapore and analysis of the impact.

programme.title: Lunch With Us
programme.desc: Have lunch in Singapore with a chef introducing a S6 Michelin-endorsed hawker meal. Explore a hidden vegetarian hotspot inside a temple. And a halal food vlogger reveals a favourite food haunt.

programme.title: Insight
programme.desc: Post-pandemic travel has returned with a vengeance, with tourist numbers breaking records in many territories. Yet, one country in Southeast Asia lags its neighbours - The Philippines. Why?

programme.title: Asia Tonight
programme.desc: News and views from around the region, delivered with uniquely Asian perspectives.

programme.title: The Elite of Devils
programme.desc: Five university students are assigned a project at a mysterious estate, where they meet Lady Salakjit, an elite socialite with a deadly secret. As her demonic powers surface, their academic trip turns into a frantic struggle for survival against a centuries-old curse of the ruling class.

programme.title: Never Leave
programme.desc: Strange incidents keep happening in Lin Yue's house after a car accident: her sister cannot see the images of her family members in the mirror; her father is peeping at night; and there is the sound of marbles from the attic every day at dawn. Following the sound to the attic, Lin Yue finds her own death portrait as she opens the door...

programme.title: Room For Rent
programme.desc: Lonely widow Joyce rents out a room in her house and becomes dangerously obsessed with a younger guest. Desperate for love, she is willing to eliminate anyone hindering her pursuit of happiness, and a chilling tale of obsession unfolds.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: The Getaway
programme.desc: Three KOLs set out to live‑stream their trip to a remote island, but are deceived by a mysterious old woman who traps them there, intent on finding brides for her disabled grandsons. As they are captured, they must race against time to escape.

programme.title: 3AM - The Campsite
programme.desc: A group of friends goes on a camping trip inside a supposedly haunted forest despite warning not to do so. As night falls and camps are set, the complicated relationships of lust and love between them are exposed, triggering a series of paranormal events that punishes them. When dawn breaks, who will get out of the forest alive?

programme.desc: Three KOLs set out to live‑stream their trip to a remote island, but are deceived by a mysterious old woman who traps them there, intent on finding brides for her disabled grandsons. As they are captured, they must race against time to escape.

programme.title: 3AM - The Campsite
programme.desc: A group of friends goes on a camping trip inside a supposedly haunted forest despite warning not to do so. As night falls and camps are set, the complicated relationships of lust and love between them are exposed, triggering a series of paranormal events that punishes them. When dawn breaks, who will get out of the forest alive?

programme.title: Lost Memories
programme.desc: As a young mother grapples with her daughter's mysterious disappearance, a series of eerie events unfold. These events could be linked to the vengeful ghosts of a tragic accident that happened 20 years ago...

programme.title: Hoarders (S15)
programme.desc: Terri blames hoarding on her busy schedule, but past trauma reveals the truth. After a fire raised safety concerns, she must clean up with the Hoarders team.

programme.title: Taking the Stand (S3)
programme.desc: During a routine undercover prostitution sting, Columbus Vice Detective Andrew Mitchell shoots and kills 23-year-old Donna Dalton Castleberry.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: A jilted lover takes to the internet to stalk her ex and threaten his girlfriend. When she finally follows through on her violent threats, detectives find themselves entangled in a deadly web of deception.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent? (S5)
programme.desc: A Louisiana trail-ride dance party is cut short when shots ring out. A man dies, and his daughter's partner—who was standing nearby—is accused.

programme.title: Hoarders (S15)

programme.title: Undercover: Caught on Tape
programme.desc: On his last day as an undercover agent, Bergen County Detective Carlos James experiences his first shootout, and ATF Agent Jenn Eskew poses as a hitwoman to investigate a possible murder for hire.

programme.title: Booked: First Day in (S1)
programme.desc: A career criminal and first-time arrestee bond in custody; an expecting father faces the prospect of missing his child's birth, and a 20-year-old aspiring model gets a taste of the inside of a jail cell.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: A suspect loses his cool in the interrogation room; a man with a shocking gunshot wound leaves police with more questions than answers; a game of hide and seek turns deadly; and more.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: A model is questioned about a deadly encounter with her boyfriend; a man makes a cold-blooded confession; a person of interest says too much; and more.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died
programme.desc: After a man is shot dead, pathologist Dr. Antoine Wrice works with investigators to interpret unusual evidence found on the scene and unwind the complex case that could be more than a typical homicide.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder in the Bayou
programme.desc: In 1991 Curtis "Cochise" Smith, 29, heads out for diapers in Plaquemine, Louisiana, and vanishes. Twenty-five years later, a body surfaces in the bayou, and Cochise's murder case reignites.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S2)
programme.desc: Matt Riffle investigates the murder of a New Orleans native, who was shot and killed after a brief altercation. Det. Tanisha Smith investigates the homicide of a mother and the abduction of her daughter.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S2)
programme.desc: An online dispute turns into a physical fight that ends with a mother losing her life. As Det. Fyfe unravels names of possible suspects, he zeroes in on a gang that has been terrorising the city.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a traffic stop leads to a shocking arrest; a driver flees an accident with a man clinging to the hood of her car, and more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A man hurls furniture onto a busy NYC street from atop a skyscraper; a self-proclaimed bride is arrested for DUI on her supposed wedding day, and more!

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: When mother of two, Deanna Cook, missed her daily call to her mom, her family began to worry Deanna's 'stalker' might be involved. After texting and calling Deanna, her family called 911.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: the Series
programme.desc: Five women share their harrowing accounts of abduction and imprisonment. They discuss what happens when the news coverage dies down and how they've healed from the trauma they experienced.

programme.desc: Maliwanagan kung ano ang suprasegmental, pagbubuod, pagsusuri at paghahambing ng iba't ibang uri ng panitikan, at kung paano gamitin ang angkop na pahayag at panadang anaporik at kataporik na pangngalan.

programme.title: Grade 7 Math
programme.desc: Identify the key concepts of geometry of shapes and sizes, and geometric relationships.

programme.title: Grade 7 English
programme.desc: Learn how to use multimedia resources and oral language when giving information, and how to express one's belief, cite evidence, and reign in thoughts in public forums.

programme.title: Grade 7 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Alamin ang mga pagbabago, pag-unlad at pagpapatuloy sa Timog at Kanlurang Asya sa transisyonal at makabagong panahon (ika-16 hanggang ika-20 siglo).

programme.title: Grade 7 Science
programme.desc: Know more about motion in one dimension, waves as a carrier of energy, and the characteristics of light, alongside the different charging processes and how heat is transferred.

programme.title: ALS
programme.desc: Learn about the process of planning, setting up, running a small business, and entrepreneurial skills.

programme.title: Grade 5 Filipino
programme.desc: Alamin ang wastong pagamit ng mga pang-abay, pang-uri, pang-angkop, pangatnig, salitang naglalarawan. Aralin kung paano magsulat ng pangungusap, talata, at balita, at kung paano magsuri ng mga kuwento at mga pahayag.

programme.title: Grade 5 Math
programme.desc: Discover what are percents, polygons, circles, solid figures, sequences, time, circumference, and how to solve simple equations.

programme.title: Grade 5 English
programme.desc: Differentiate the various text-types and know how to summarize them, as well as how to make a stand and provide evidences supporting opinions or facts.

programme.title: Grade 5 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Matuto tungkol sa mga pagbabago sa lipunan ng sinaunang Pilipino kabilang ang pagpupunyagi ng ilang pangkat na mapanatili ang kalayaan sa Kolonyalismong Espanyol at ang impluwensya nito sa kasalukuyan.

programme.title: Grade 5 Science
programme.desc: Learn more about motion in terms of distance and time, alongside how objects and people interact and are affected by light, sound, and heat, and electricity. Discover the relationship of electricity and magnetism in electromagnets, and what simple DC circuits are.

programme.title: Preschool | ECCD
programme.desc: Learn about the concept of size, length, weight, time, and money. Study how children can take care of themselves and understand the objects in the environment and their attributes.

programme.title: Kindergarten
programme.desc: Learn about the concept of size, length, weight, time, and money. Study how children can take care of themselves and understand the objects in the environment and their attributes.

programme.title: Grade 1 Language
programme.desc: Pag-aralan ang konsepto ng pagbabaybay, panghalip, pangngalan, salitang naglalarawan, at ang pagtukoy ng sariling ideya at opinyon tungkol sa napakinggang kuwento.

programme.title: Grade 1 Math
programme.desc: Know more about fractions 1⁄2 and 1/4, 2-dimensional and 3-dimensional figures, as well as continuous and repeating patterns and mathematical sentences.

programme.title: Grade 1 Reading & Literacy
programme.desc: Learn about polite expressions and how to talk about oneself, one’s family and one’s personal experiences.

programme.title: Grade 1 Makabansa
programme.desc: Unawain ang kahalagahan ng pagkilala ng mga batayang impormasyon ng pisikal na kapaligiran sa sariling paaralan at ng mga taong bumubuo rito para sa paghubog ng kakayahan ng bawat mag-aaral.

programme.title: Grade 2 Filipino
programme.desc: Matuto tungkol sa pangngalan, panghalip, salitang magkatugma, salitang naglalarawan, at pagbabaybay, pati na rin ang iba't ibang elemento ng kuwento at ang pag-uugnay ng sarili sa tekstong nabasa.

programme.title: Grade 2 Math
programme.desc: Study how to divide whole numbers up to 1000 including money and unit fractions. Learn more about straight and curved lines, flat and curved surfaces, and basic shapes and continuous patterns using two attributes.

programme.title: Grade 2 English
programme.desc: Discover what are word clines, synonyms, and antonyms. Identify major points and key themes in a story, and the difference between what is made-up and real in texts.

programme.title: Grade 2 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Alamin ang kahalagahan ng mabuting paglilingkod ng mga namumuno sa pagsulong ng mga pangunahing hanapbuhay at pagtugon sa pangangailangan ng mga kasapi ng sariling komunidad.

programme.title: Grade 3 Filipino

programme.title: Grade 3 Math
programme.desc: Identify which fractions are proper and improper, similar and dissimilar and equivalent. Learn more about lines and symmetrical designs, continuous and repeating patterns, and mathematical sentences involving multiplication and division of whole numbers.

programme.title: Grade 3 English
programme.desc: Study what are homonyms, homographs, and hyponyms. Know more about the elements of a story, how to write it, and how to compare and contrast its information, alongside learning about words, phrases, and sentences with long vowels.

programme.title: Grade 3 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Unawain at pahalagahan ang pagkakakilanlang kultural ng kinabibilangang rehiyon.

programme.title: Grade 3 Science
programme.desc: Discover how objects perform motion, and learn about the source of light, sound, heat and electricity, along with their uses.

programme.title: Grade 8 Filipino
programme.desc: Alamin kung paano magsuri at maghambing ng iba't ibang uri ng panitikan, kung ano ang mga estratehiya sa pagkuha ng impormasyon, paano wastong gamitin ang impormal na komunikasyon, at ang angkop na ekspresyon sa pagbabahagi ng ideya o opinyon tungkol sa mga tekstong nabasa.

programme.title: Grade 8 Math
programme.desc: Identify the key concepts of axiomatic structure of geometry and triangle congruence.

programme.title: Grade 8 English
programme.desc: Examine what are biases, propagandas, parallelism, and cohesive devices in different types of speech.

programme.title: Grade 8 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Aralin ang naging transpormasyon tungo sa makabagong panahon ng mga bansa at rehiyon sa daigdig bunsod ng paglaganap ng mga kaisipan sa agham, politika, at ekonomiya tungo sa pagbuo ng pandaigdigan kamalayan.

programme.title: Grade 8 Science
programme.desc: Learn more about the particle nature of matter as a basis for explaining properties, physical changes, and structure of substances and mixtures. programme.title: Noir Comme Neige - L'Oeil Du Diable
programme.desc: In Switzerland, Captain Meyer narrowly escapes death after receiving a statuette of a devil with red eyes. An inexplicable coincidence: on the French side, the same object is found by gendarme Vivier near the body of a timber dealer mysteriously deceased in an isolated chapel.

programme.title: Version Francaise
programme.desc: In Boulogne-Billancourt, visit the Musee des Annees 30. Stefania Di Petrillo explores the emotional dimensions of design. Artistic director Pieter Mulier is following in the footsteps of the founder of the Alaia fashion house: sophistication at its best. The organic forms of an omnipresent nature are embodied in the creations of cabinetmaker Maxime Goleo.

programme.title: L'autre Laurens
programme.desc: Specialized in adultery cases, private detective Gabriel Laurens is approached by Jade, the daughter of his twin brother. She asks him to investigate the apparently accidental death of her father. During his investigation, Gabriel plunges back into the complexity of his family history.

programme.title: LA Maison-Bleue
programme.desc: Rivard and his party are riding high and busy preparing their referendum. But Hamelin still holds one trump card. Meanwhile, Mireille is on cloud nine as she continues to pursue her saga in the world of showbiz.

programme.title: LA Maison-Bleue
programme.desc: Hamelin informs Harvey and Boudreau of the offer made by Richards: the USA will help Quebec to become America's 51st state. Stephane is in France and quickly becomes disenchanted with her affair with the French first lady.

programme.title: LA Maison-Bleue
programme.desc: Given the national emergency, Rivard is informed about the state of the dams. Stephane is staying with Karine, who is increasingly in love with him. Following a misunderstanding, Boudreau is intercepted by a CIA agent.

programme.title: Le Grand Jt Des Territoires
programme.desc: Up-to-date news from the French regions presented by Cyril Viguier.

programme.title: Maghreb-Orient Express
programme.desc: What's new in the Arab worlds? Journalist Mohamed Kaci hosts those making the cultural headlines in Tunis, Algiers, Rabat, Beirut, Alexandria, Dubai...

programme.title: 64' actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. Increased focus on Francophone cultural news, with dedicated sequences. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: L'Invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Au Bout De L'Enquete, LA Fin Du Crime Parfait ?
programme.desc: They are all cases that were closed, considered unsolvable, sometimes resisting police efforts for decades until a forgotten clue, an unhoped-for witness or a forensic innovation finally made it possible to unmask the culprit. Alongside Marie Drucker, the criminologist Alain Bauer explains the technical, psychological, sociological or historical elements involved.

programme.title: Le Journal De LA RTBF
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: Littoral
programme.desc: On the island of Yeu, Georges Birault is a strong advocate of island agriculture. Its objective: to raise public awareness and encourage a return to these natural exploitation practices, in order to preserve the identity and ecosystem of these territories subject to importation. Despite the obstacles, new initiatives give rise to hope.

programme.title: Le Journal afrique
programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.title: L'actu
programme.desc: The televised news programme from TVMonaco.

programme.title: Le Journal De LA RTS
programme.desc: All the news from RTS.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (8 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: L'Invite

programme.title: C Dans L'air
programme.desc: All the latest major events, presented, explained and analysed! Special guests and journalists in the studio analyse both the latest news but also other controversial issues to give us a better understanding of the social, political and cultural events occurring around us.

programme.title: Chroniques D'En Haut
programme.desc: A magazine programme devoted to the mountains. An opportunity to explore a rich and fascinating world and take a sumptuous journey through the heart of the most beautiful landscapes of the Auvergne-Rhone-Alpes region.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Bien Bati
programme.desc: The Arvida heritage site in Saguenay is home to houses which tell a whole story. Gatineau matchstick houses are becoming increasingly rare. And we discover the talent of a carpenter consultant on heritage.

programme.title: Le Gout Des Rencontres Normandes
programme.desc: In the Perche region, David Gallienne meets Paulo, the local culinary authority. Of Portuguese origin, he blends Portuguese and regional inspirations. Together, they prepare a classic Portuguese meat stew: feijoada.
